# Black Creek Technology
> Boutique consultancy specializing in data engineering and ML/AI enablement.

## About
Black Creek Technology helps organizations unlock the power of data and AI — from pipeline architecture to production ML systems.

## Services
- Data Engineering: Modern pipelines, lakehouse architecture, ETL/ELT, real-time streaming
- ML/AI Enablement: Model development, training, and production deployment
- AI Agent Systems: Intelligent agent orchestration for complex workflow automation
- Data Strategy: Advisory services for data infrastructure, governance, and analytics

## Demo
https://demo.blkcrk.com — Live AI agent orchestration demo

## Contact
